model_specification_line: wls('fulltime ~ C(treatment) + C(state_str) + C(year_str) + age', data=df, weights=df['perwt']).fit()
sample_selection: citizen in (3, 5) (not a citizen or citizenship status not reported)
age >= 16 and age <= 30 (at least 16 by June 15, 2012; under 31 on June 15, 2012)
uhrswork != 0 (usual hours worked per week reported)
treatment_definition: Age-based DACA eligibility indicator: 1 if would have been age 16-30 in June 2012 (i.e., for survey year Y, treatment=1 if age in [Y-2012+16, Y-2012+30])
